Title: ST_GeometryN
Description: Given a 1-based index of a member of a MULTI... or ...COLLECTION shape, returns the member.
Given a 1-based index of a member of a MULTI... or ...COLLECTION shape, returns the member.
Examples:
SQL> select st_geometryn (
       st_geometryn (
         st_ewkt_read ('
           GEOMETRYCOLLECTION(
              POINT(0 0),
              MULTILINESTRING(
                (1 5,0 1,4 0,5 4),
                (1 5,1 0,4 0,4 5)),
              MULTIPOLYGON(
               ((1 3,2 4,1 5,0 4,1 3)),
               ((1 2,2 1,1 0,0 1,1 2))))'),
        3),1)
POLYGON((1.0 3.0,2.0 4.0,1.0 5.0,0.0 4.0,1.0 3.0))
